titleStmt.title: SII 27.183: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 183. (A.R. No. 80 of 1944-45.) KALLAHAḶḶI, HOSPET TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: Stone set up near the stream.

This record registers a gift of the village Kallahaḷi, a hamlet of the city (paṭṭaṇa) of Tirumaladēviamma, free from several taxes like sidhāya etc., to god Jaṁbunātha, for worship and offerings, by the king for the merit of his parents Narasaṇanāyaka-voḍeya and Vōbājiamma.
It is dated Śaka 146[2], Śārvari, Kārttika śu. 12. The tithi corresponds to 1540 A.D., November 11. But the details cannot be verified.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī jaṁbunātha dēvara śāsanake (śu)
śubhamastu . namastuṁga . śirasaṁ
bi caṁdracāmara cāravē trailōkya
nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya
saṁbhavē . svastiśrī jayādhbhyudaya
śālivāhana śakavaruṣa 1462 neya śrī
śārvari saṁvatsarada kārtika śuddha 12 śrī
maṁnmahārājādhirāja paramēśvara śrīvīra
pratāpa śrī Acutarāya dēvama
hārāyaru śrī jaṁbunātha dēvarige A
mrutapaḍi dhūpa dīpa naivēdyakke samarpi
sida tirumaladēvi Aṁmanavara paṭṭa
ṇakke saluva kallahaḷiya grāma 1
nu naṁmataṁde narasaṇanāyaka vo
ḍeyarigeU naṁma tāyigaḷu
vōbāji AṁmmanavarigeU puṁ
ṇyavāgabēkeṁdu śārva
ri saṁvatsarada kārtika śu 12
puṁṇyakāladalū dānadhārāpūrva
kavāgi samarpisideU yi kallahaḷiya
grāmadalu huṭṭida hakkaladāya
sidhāya suṁka
svāmya biṭi birāḍa nuṁṭāda
Ādāyavanu sarvamānyavā
gi Ā caṁdrākkatāraṁ Āginaḍava
yalū samarpideU
dharmake Ārobaru tapidare taṁma ta
ṁma taṁde tāyigaḷanu vāraṇāsiya
li koṁda pāpakke hōharu gōhatya
bhraṁhatya bhrūṇahatya pātakava
māḍida pāpakke hōharu
Digital edition of SII 27.183 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
